crime.value: Murder by thrown knives in an alley during a date
crime.quote: He threw knives as sharp as needles and as fast as lightning. Thud. Then Derik fell. Three. Three knives.

victim.value: Derik, a 19-year-old on a first date, seemingly random target
victim.quote: That's all it took. to kill him.i wanted to scream bloody murder. (cause it was).

closed_world.value: Dark alley as shortcut to pizza palace, isolated location
closed_world.quote: We started down a street to the ally, a short cut to the pizza palace.

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown knife-thrower seeking a sapphire necklace called 'heart of the ocean'

investigator.value: Kelsey Peters, the surviving victim/witness narrating her experience
investigator.quote: I'm apparently VERY far from home. Good. I'm away from that creep.

red_herring.value: Narrator's lie about sapphire location - claiming it's in purse when it's actually around her neck
red_herring.quote: "its in my purse."I lied It was around my neck.

clue_fairness.value: Reader knows narrator is lying about sapphire location when she tells the attacker
clue_fairness.quote: "its in my purse."I lied It was around my neck.

social_world.value: Dating culture and family expectations - young adults navigating romantic relationships and parental introductions
social_world.quote: "I want to meet your parents." "Cause I want to get to know you better."

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's trauma from parents' deaths - mother's skiing accident and father's subsequent suicide
investigator_wound.quote: By the time we found her, she was dead, buried in snow, and drenched in her own blood.
